sharc
Documentation développeur
unpack.h
1 #ifndef __audi_sparse_functional_unpack_h__
2 #define __audi_sparse_functional_unpack_h__
3 
4 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AuDi/dense/scalar.h"
5 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AuDi/sparse/functional/IO.h"
6 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AuDi/sparse/scalar_wrapper.h"
7 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AuDi/sparse/expression.h"
8 
9 #include <vector>
10 
11 namespace audi {
12 
13  namespace details {
14 
15  template<typename T>
16  static void unpack(T* s, const std::vector<int>& index_redir, T c, const node<T>& e)
17  {
18  T coef = c * e.coef;
19  for(auto i = 0; i < e.size; ++i) {
20  if (e.indexes[i] != -1){
21  int redir = index_redir[e.indexes[i]];
22  if(redir!=-1)
23  s[redir] += coef * e.gradient[i];
24  }
25  }
26  if(e.next) {
27  unpack(s, index_redir, c, *(e.next));
28  }
29  if(e.nested) {
30  unpack(s, index_redir, coef, *(e.nested));
31  }
32  }
33 
34  template<typename T>
35  static void unpack(T* s, T c, const node<T>& e)
36  {
37  T coef = c * e.coef;
38  for(auto i = 0; i < e.size; ++i) {
39  if (e.indexes[i] != -1){
40  s[e.indexes[i]] += coef * e.gradient[i];
41  }
42  }
43  if(e.next) {
44  unpack(s, c, *(e.next));
45  }
46  if(e.nested) {
47  unpack(s, coef, *(e.nested));
48  }
49  }
50 
51  } // namespace details
52 
53  template<typename T>
54  static void unpack(Arcane::UniqueArray<T>& unpacked_derivatives, const sparse_expression<T>& e, const bool force=true)
55  {
56  if(!e.is_unpack() || force){
57  unpacked_derivatives.fill(T(0));
58  if(e.second){
59  T* gradient = unpacked_derivatives.unguardedBasePointer();
60  if(e.index_redir().empty())
61  details::unpack(gradient, T(1), *(e.second));
62  else
63  details::unpack(gradient, e.index_redir(), T(1), *(e.second));
64  }
65  e.is_unpack(true);
66  }
67  }
68 
69 
70  template<typename T>
71  static scalar<T> unpack(const int size, const sparse_expression<T>& e)
72  {
73  scalar<T> s(size);
74  s.value() = e.first;
75  T* gradient = s.derivatives();
76  if(e.second){
77  if(e.index_redir().empty())
78  details::unpack(gradient, T(1), *(e.second));
79  else
80  details::unpack(gradient, e.index_redir(), T(1), *(e.second));
81  }
82  return s;
83  }
84 
85  // attention pas de correction
86  // to delete
87  template<typename T>
88  static scalar<T> unpack(const int size, const scalar_wrapper<T>& v)
89  {
90  const sparse_expression<T>& e = v;
91  return unpack(size, e);
92  }
93 
94 }
95 
96 #endif /* __audi_sparse_functional_unpack_h__ */
